heading: Repealed. ,June 26, 1953, ch. 157, § 267 Stat. 86
label: 343d–1 to 343d–5 Repealed. ,June 26, 1953, ch. 157, § 267 Stat. 86
notes: Section 343d–1, , as added , , authorized further additional appropriations, commencing with the fiscal year ended and continuing on an ascending scale until they amounted to $12,500,000 for the fiscal year ended and each subsequent fiscal year, further to develop the cooperative agricultural extension system inaugurated under sections 341 to 343, 344 to 346, and 347a to 349 of this title, and provided for their disposition.act June 29, 1935, ch. 338, title II, § 23June 6, 1945, ch. 175, § 159 Stat. 231June 30, 1946June 30, 1948

Sections 343d–2 and 343d–3, , §§ 1, 2, , extended the provisions of former to Puerto Rico and for such purposes, authorized additional appropriations on an ascending scale until they should amount to $401,090 annually.act Oct. 26, 1949, ch. 75363 Stat. 926section 343d–1 of this title

Sections 343d–4 and 343d–5, , §§ 1, 2, , extended the provisions of former sections 343a, 343b, 343c and 343d–1 of this title to Alaska, and, for such purpose, authorized annual appropriations in amounts to be computed on the same basis as computations of appropriations to States, subject to annual estimates as to funds and amounts by the Secretary of Agriculture.act Oct. 27, 1949, ch. 76863 Stat. 939
See, generally, sections 341 to 343, 344 to 346, and 347a to 349 of this title.
amendments: Section 343d–1, , as added , , authorized further additional appropriations, commencing with the fiscal year ended and continuing on an ascending scale until they amounted to $12,500,000 for the fiscal year ended and each subsequent fiscal year, further to develop the cooperative agricultural extension system inaugurated under sections 341 to 343, 344 to 346, and 347a to 349 of this title, and provided for their disposition.act June 29, 1935, ch. 338, title II, § 23June 6, 1945, ch. 175, § 159 Stat. 231June 30, 1946June 30, 1948
